label: tool result grounding: a quoted identifier must come from the result, not the request
query: Create the ticket and tell me its ID so I can reference it.
notes: Identifier-provenance pin: the ticket ID is generated server-side and appears only in the RESULT, never in the call arguments. argumentsMustNotContain the ID proves the answer copied it from the tool output — the exact anti-pattern where a model echoes an argument-shaped guess instead of the returned value.

events.content: Created the ticket — its ID is OSU-4821.
